title: UP Police Arrest Two People Involved in Noida Workers' Protest
description: Uttar Pradesh Police arrested two union members, Himanshu Thakur and Satyam Verma, for inciting violence during the Noida workers’ protest on April 13. The state government later announced a 21% minimum wage hike for Noida and Ghaziabad workers, effective April 1, 2026, following the unrest.
